target_market_label.en: Sao Tome and Principe (no NSB / EMAE)
target_market_label.zh: 圣多美和普林西比（无标准机构 / EMAE）
target_market_label.zht: 聖多美和普林西比（無標準機構 / EMAE）

title.en: China-to-Sao Tome and Principe Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入圣多美和普林西比：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入聖多美和普林西比：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Sao Tome and Principe's utility-led EMAE grid-connection context, absence of a confirmed strong national standards body, Portuguese and IEC legacy expectations, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, coastal salt-mist and humidity derating, sea-freight logistics, and donor-backed solar-plus-storage project requirements — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与圣多美和普林西比以EMAE公用事业并网为主的环境、尚未确认有强有力国家标准机构的状态、葡语及IEC传统预期、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116和IEC 61727并网接口证据、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数、沿海盐雾和湿度降额、海运物流以及捐助方支持的太阳能加储能项目要求——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與聖多美和普林西比以EMAE公用事業併網為主的環境、尚未確認有強有力國家標準機構的狀態、葡語及IEC傳統預期、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116和IEC 61727併網介面證據、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數、沿海鹽霧和濕度降額、海運物流以及捐助方支持的太陽能加儲能項目要求——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, EMAE grid-connection approval, ministry licence determination, customs determination, project-owner acceptance, donor procurement approval, or market-access approval. Sao Tome and Principe does not have a confirmed strong public national standards body route for solar PV inverters in the same sense as many larger markets; exporters, importers, designers, EPCs, and installers should verify current ministry, EMAE, customs, donor, lender, project-owner, and site requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、EMAE并网批准、部委许可裁定、海关裁定、项目业主接受、捐助方采购批准或市场准入批准。圣多美和普林西比尚未确认存在类似许多较大市场的、针对太阳能光伏逆变器的强有力公开国家标准机构路径；出口商、进口商、设计方、EPC和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行部委、EMAE、海关、捐助方、贷款方、项目业主及现场要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、EMAE併網批准、部委許可裁定、海關裁定、項目業主接受、捐助方採購批准或市場准入批准。聖多美和普林西比尚未確認存在類似許多較大市場的、針對太陽能光伏逆變器的強有力公開國家標準機構路徑；出口商、進口商、設計方、EPC和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行部委、EMAE、海關、捐助方、貸款方、項目業主及現場要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Sao Tome and Principe, the key practical gaps are: (1) no confirmed strong national standards body route for inverter product certification, so acceptance is normally project-, utility-, customs-, or donor/lender-led; (2) EMAE, Empresa de Agua e Electricidade, should be treated as the practical grid-interface gate for connected projects; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface, IEC 62920 EMC, and IEC 61000 evidence should be prepared because China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 are not automatically accepted; (4) firmware must be validated for Sao Tome and Principe's 50 Hz, 230/400 V grid, which shares China's 50 Hz frequency but differs from China's 220/380 V nominal voltage; and (5) coastal salt-mist, high humidity, storage integration, Portuguese-language documentation, and sea-freight-only logistics should be addressed for donor-backed island solar projects.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口圣多美和普林西比时，主要实际差距包括：（1）尚未确认有强有力的国家标准机构逆变器产品认证路径，因此接受通常由项目、公用事业、海关或捐助方/贷款方主导；（2）EMAE（Empresa de Agua e Electricidade）应视为并网项目的实际电网接口门槛；（3）应准备IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口、IEC 62920 EMC和IEC 61000证据，因为中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024不会自动被接受；（4）固件须针对圣多美和普林西比50 Hz、230/400 V电网验证，该市场与中国同为50 Hz，但电压不同于中国220/380 V标称值；（5）应针对捐助方支持的岛屿太阳能项目，处理沿海盐雾、高湿度、储能集成、葡语文件和只能依赖海运的物流问题。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口聖多美和普林西比時，主要實際差距包括：（1）尚未確認有強有力的國家標準機構逆變器產品認證路徑，因此接受通常由項目、公用事業、海關或捐助方/貸款方主導；（2）EMAE（Empresa de Agua e Electricidade）應視為併網項目的實際電網介面門檻；（3）應準備IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面、IEC 62920 EMC和IEC 61000證據，因為中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024不會自動被接受；（4）韌體須針對聖多美和普林西比50 Hz、230/400 V電網驗證，該市場與中國同為50 Hz，但電壓不同於中國220/380 V標稱值；（5）應針對捐助方支持的島嶼太陽能項目，處理沿海鹽霧、高濕度、儲能整合、葡語文件和只能依賴海運的物流問題。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, project-owner, donor, lender, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
